Events

ticketio_event_available

  • calendar_month Datum Do. 30.04.2026 — So. 03.05.2026
  • location_on Adresse/Location: BLITZ Club, München
  • confirmation_number Tickets ab 18,00 Euro
  • info We celebrate our longest and biggest party to date: three days and nights of music from local and global friends, family and special guests - NONSTOP on three floors with 50+ artists. And above all: the Blitz crowd - our beloved family - making every single minute worthwhile.

    with...
    600-cell / Altinbas / Batu / Boyá / Carlos Valdes / Cassy / Chami / Chlär / D.Dan / Dax Lee / Denny Voltage / Der Brane / DJ Sweet6teen / DVS1 / Ed Karney / Edward / evolpeeD / Fadi Mohem / Freddy / GiGi FM / Glaskin / Jovonn / Kareem el Morr / Katia Curie / Kia / Lara Fein / LHF Squad (Felix, Sumi, vince) / limbic sis / Marco Shuttle / Muallem / Nicolas Lutz / Nizar Sarakbi / Olivia Mendez / Oracy / Paquita Gordon / Parallel 9 / Petre Inspirescu / Polygonia / Rosati / Ryan Elliott / Sarmabot / Sindicato De Baile / Stella Zekri / Stenny / Tijana T / Victor / XDB / Yamour / Zenker Brothers
